name: Settings - Webhook URL can be configured and test button is visible
description: After mock login, navigate to /settings and find the Webhook configuration section. Enter a valid webhook URL, click Save Settings, and verify the button briefly shows 'Saved!' text confirming persistence. Also verify the 'Test Webhook' button is visible.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /api/mock-login?secret=mantiz_e2e_bypass_2026 to authenticate the session
Verify the Settings page is visible with a Webhook section containing a URL input field (id='webhook-url-input')
Verify a button with id='webhook-test-button' labeled 'Test Webhook' or 'Send Test' is visible in the Webhook section
Click the webhook URL input field (id='webhook-url-input'), clear it, and type 'https://webhook.site/test-mantiz'
Click the Save Settings button (id='save-settings-button') to persist the webhook URL
Verify the Save Settings button (id='save-settings-button') now shows text 'Saved!' confirming the settings were saved successfully
